page: Google Cloud Platform c4n-highmem-2 is an x86_64 architecture server instance configured with 2 dedicated virtual CPUs and 15.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a memory-to-core ratio of 7.5 GB per vCPU. The instance does not include integrated local storage or bundled graphics processing units, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. Additionally, it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the c4n-highmem-2 offers a high memory allocation relative to its low vCPU count, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads that require more RAM than processing power without paying for unnecessary CPU cores. However, the lack of local NVMe storage and dedicated GPUs represents a clear tradeoff, limiting its utility for high-speed local caching or hardware-accelerated parallel processing.

This server configuration is suited for memory-sensitive but compute-light workloads. Appropriate use cases include small-scale databases, in-memory caching layers, lightweight enterprise applications, and basic web serving where memory capacity is prioritized over high CPU core counts.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4n-highmem-2 is an x86_64 architecture server instance configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 15.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 7.5 GB per vCPU. This instance does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring reliance on network-attached storage for data persistence. Designed for memory-intensive workloads that do not demand high CPU core counts, the c4n-highmem-2 provides a balanced, qualitatively cost-efficient profile for memory-sensitive operations. It is well-suited for small databases, caching layers, and lightweight application servers. The lack of local NVMe storage and dedicated GPUs represents a clear tradeoff, limiting its utility for high-speed local caching or hardware-accelerated parallel processing, but it remains highly efficient for memory-sensitive but compute-light workloads.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4n-highmem-2 is an x86_64 server featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 15.0 GB of RAM. It is designed for memory-sensitive workloads requiring no local storage or GPU acceleration.

tagline: An x86_64 cloud server configuration providing fifteen gigabytes of system memory to support memory-sensitive and low-compute workloads.

No local storage or integrated GPU hardware included
Suited for small-scale databases and in-memory caching
